section: Schedule B: Transactions (typed attachment, transposed spreadsheet)
layout_note: Transposed spreadsheet: each COLUMN is one transaction; row labels down the left are EIF / SP,DC,JT / Security Name / Ticker / Transaction / Amount of Transaction (buckets A: None through L: Over $50,000,000 plus Spouse/DC Asset over $1,000,000) / Type of Transaction (Purchase, Sale, Partial Sale, Exchange) / Capital Gain Exceeded $200 / Transaction Date. Selected cells are solid-black filled instead of X. The row labeled 'Transaction' is solid black across all five columns (appears to be a formatting fill, not data). EIF row is blank for all columns. No column has the Capital Gain Exceeded $200 cell filled. Bottom-left footer label: 'MS MR Trust Partnership' (portfolio these transactions belong to). Owner cell of the SPWFD column is printed lowercase 'sp'.

rows.asset_name: GS Buffered PLUS Based on the Value of the EURO STOXX 50 Index due Oct 3,2019 (SPVOA)
MS Buffered PLUS Based on the Value of the MSCI Europe Index due July 24, 2020 (SPWFD)

uncertainties.read: solid black fill in 'Transaction' label row spans all columns
uncertainties.note: Interpreted as decorative/blacked-out row, not data; amounts taken from the filled bucket cells (G for SPVOA; F for VGK, SPWFD, VGK; C for AGN).
